overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a cobblestone path by a lake at night, approaching and exploring an ornate stone gazebo. The scene features a moody teal night sky with atmospheric lighting from ornate lampposts and the distant glow of a settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded hillside descending to lakeside path

events.description: moving from grassy terrain onto cobblestone path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking down a grassy slope toward a cobblestone lakeside path, carrying swords on his back

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the left side of the path
large spreading tree with dense foliage overhanging the path
worn cobblestone walkway leading down to the water
calm lake reflecting the night sky with mountains beyond

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a grassy wooded area at night, with Geralt descending a slope toward a cobblestone path. A stone retaining wall runs along the left side while a large olive tree dominates the center view. The camera follows as the character transitions from grass to the cobblestone path, revealing a calm mountain lake in the distance under a teal night sky.

events.description: passing under an ornate lamppost casting warm orange light
approaching the large stone gazebo structure by the water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path with the lake visible on the right side, approaching the gazebo

entered.detail: tall stone lamppost with warm glowing lantern on top
large ornate stone gazebo with columns overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open cobblestone path with full view of the teal night sky, the camera passes an ornate lamppost casting warm light. The stone gazebo becomes visible in the distance across the calm lake, while the path continues straight toward it. The vegetation thins out as the character moves along the waterfront promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone gazebo with statues overlooking water

events.description: entering the covered stone gazebo structure
turning right to walk around the gazebo interior perimeter
turning left to exit the gazebo and return to the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt entering the gazebo and walking around its interior, examining the stone architecture and statues

notable_agents.action: armored knight standing guard near the gazebo entrance holding a sword

entered.detail: tall ornate stone columns supporting the gazebo roof
winged angelic statues positioned between the columns
curved stone bench along the gazebo railing
decorative stone balustrade overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters the semi-covered stone gazebo, passing between tall pillars and winged statues. An armored NPC stands guard near the entrance. The camera turns to walk around the interior perimeter, passing stone benches and ornate railings overlooking the distant lake. The lighting shifts to a mix of moonlight and the warm glow from exterior braziers as the character explores the structure before exiting back to the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded wooded slope toward the structured elegance of a lakeside gazebo under a teal night sky. It begins with Geralt descending through a grassy area past a large olive tree and a stone retaining wall, transitioning smoothly onto a cobblestone path that reveals a calm mountain lake in the distance. As the character moves along the waterfront promenade, the vegetation thins and the camera passes an ornate lamppost casting a warm glow, bringing the distant stone gazebo into clear view. The scene then shifts as the character enters the semi-covered structure, passing between tall pillars and winged statues while an armored guard stands watch. Finally, the camera circles the interior perimeter past stone benches and ornate railings, blending moonlight with the warmth of exterior braziers before turning back toward the open path.
